episode_event_academy_spring_2026_02/830: So you’re Viola!

I’ve heard so many good things about you.
It’s great to finally meet!

I was looking forward to meeting you too,
Perrin!
I really respect you, Viola.

Balancing life as a photographer and a
Gym Leader... That’s amazing.
Me? My hands are full with just a camera.

No no—having even one thing you can be
proud of is wonderful!

You photograph for Blueberry Academy,
right? You help with their marketing?

If others recognize your skill, then you’re the
real deal!
Praise from you, Viola... I’m honored.

Just for the record...I don’t plan to lose
to you.
Bring it on!

I’ll take some great shots here at Pasio
Academy—and wow everyone!
That’s the spirit. Fantastic! Just fantastic!

Since we’re both photographers, we should
learn from each other!

Yeah! We can push ourselves to push
each other!

At Pasio Academy, I can stand in front of a
class and teach, of course...

But sometimes I get to be a student, too.
And I love every minute of it!
I know, right?!

I’m often busy tending to injured students
and Pokémon...

But whenever I can, I attend classes as a
student.
Any you recommend?
Hmm... I’d say Mr. Kabu’s class.
Kabu?! He teaches here too?!
I wanna take his class!

And there are so many Pokémon professors
from different regions I’d love to hear
lecture.
I can’t keep up! My head is spinning!
I’ll make sure you don’t fall over. Deal?
Haha! Thanks!

Hey, we should compare notes on what
classes they offer!
Yeah! We can attend some together!

(You can make friends with anyone,
no matter your position or title.)
(Yet another perk of student life!)

Hey, how about we have a secret menu at
the café?
Secret menu...?

Yeah! Y’know, stuff you can only get if you
know to ask.
That sounds fun, but...like what, exactly?

People say food tastes better outdoors.
How about some camping foods?
Hmm... Camping foods...

It’d have to be something the café can
actually serve. Toasted marshmallows?
Ooh! I like that!

And in Paldea, people always picnic with
sandwiches.
We could make some camping ones!
Tweaking recipes, huh. Sounds interesting!

Some folks eat Alolan malasadas outside
with their Pokémon.
We could adapt some of those, too!
Hehehe! The ideas just keep coming!
*grumble*

We got so carried away, I didn’t notice—I’m
starving.
Right? Let’s whip up some test batches!
Yeah! We can have a taste-testing party!

Sonia, you became a professor so young.
It’s amazing!
It’s nothing special, really!

Until recently, I couldn’t even decide what to
research as a Pokémon Professor.

And being my gran’s assistant made it hard
to stand on my own.
I see... I had no idea!
Meanwhile...

my childhood friend just kept getting more
and more successful.

The Galar Champion, right? Sounds like there
was a lot going on.

You’re one to talk! YOU made it big as
a photographer!

Nah, it hasn’t all been smooth sailing for me
either.

I had a slump where nothing seemed to
go right.
It felt like a tunnel with no exit.
I guess everyone has rough patches.
Still, setbacks and slumps are important!

Looking back, those bitter experiences helped
me grow.
Yeah... Maybe we both needed them.
I’m sure the students here will hit snags, too.

When the younger ones feel lost, we big
sisters can support from the sidelines!
